description_long: This is a modern, cubic house with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The exterior is predominantly white with large, rectangular windows and a mix of single and double-story sections. The front features a driveway with a parked car, a small tree, and a paved entry path leading to a recessed main door. On one side, there is an outdoor patio area with seating and a sunshade, while the opposite side has a garage and additional paved space. The landscaping includes a few strategically placed trees and shrubs, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes geometric simplicity, open outdoor spaces, and functional living areas.
description: A modern, white cubic house with flat roofs, large windows, a driveway, garage, and outdoor patio, surrounded by minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, parked car, main entry door, and a small tree near the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the outdoor patio with seating, sunshade, and a large window; a tree stands apart from the house.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows, a large tree close to the house, and a paved area extending from the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and two trees spaced apart from the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a paved approach, no porch, minimal overhang, and a small adjacent tree
